channel.title: APGO Journal
channel.description: Independent analysis of world affairs, football, books and public systems.

item.title: The New Geography of Power Runs Through the Sea
item.description: Shipping lanes, undersea cables, chokepoints and sovereignty are redrawing the map of global influence.

item.title: Football’s Bigger Calendar Has a Smaller Margin for Rest
item.description: The expanded game promises more global competition while the recovery burden falls on players.

item.title: Dostoevsky’s Underground Man Was Built for the Feed
item.description: A spiteful, self-conscious narrator from 1864 explains the inner machinery of posting.
